revision.comment: Bot: mark 6 deleted QID(s) as DELETED_QID in ill templates [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24122753975|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
[[ja:粟鹿大明神元記]] '''Awaga Daimyōjin Mototsufumi''' (粟鹿大明神元記) is an {{ill|ancient document|ja|古文書|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/ancient document|1=komonjo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q89298567}} passed down by the shrine families of {{ill|Awaga Shrine|en|Awaga Shrine|qid=Q11604651|lt=Awaga Shrine|1=Awaga Shrine}} in {{ill|Tajima Province|en|Tajima Province|qid=Q1053727|lt=Tajima Province|1=Tajima Province}}, {{ill|Asago District, Hyōgo|en|Asago District, Hyōgo|qid=Q4803324|lt=Asago District, Tajima|1=Asago District, Hyōgo}} (present-day {{ill|Hyōgo Prefecture|en|Hyōgo Prefecture|qid=Q130290|lt=Hyōgo Prefecture|1=Hyōgo Prefecture}}). == Overview == Compiled in the first year of {{ill|Wadō (era)|en|Wadō (era)|qid=Q1373026|lt=Wadō|1=Wadō (era)}} ({{ill|708|en|708|qid=Q23511|lt=708|1=708}}), the text was authored by {{ill|Jinbu no Sukune Nemaro|ja|神部直根麻呂|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jinbu no Sukune Nemaro|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, also known as the {{ill|Shinra General|ja|新羅将軍|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinra General|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and holder of the court Rank of Junior Sixth Rank, Upper Grade. The document details the enshrined deity {{ill|Ame-no-Misari-no-Mikoto|ja|天美佐利命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-Misari-no-Mikoto|qq=}} and the origins of Awaga Shrine. It also contains a vertical lineage chart tracing the genealogy of the {{ill|Jinbu clan|ja|神部氏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jinbu clan|qq=}}, descendants of {{ill|Izanagi|en|Izanagi|qid=Q813858|lt=Izanagi|1=Izanagi}} and {{ill|Izanami|en|Izanami|qid=Q682306|lt=Izanami|1=Izanami}}. If the date of origin is accurate, it would predate the compilation of the {{ill|Kojiki|en|Kojiki|qid=Q813031|lt=Kojiki|1=Kojiki}} and {{ill|Nihon Shoki|en|Nihon Shoki|qid=Q813935|lt=Nihon Shoki|1=Nihon Shoki}}, although there are dissenting opinions regarding its authenticity.{{Sfn|Maenosono|1977|pp=115–147|qq=}}{{Sfn|Sema|1989|pp=1–34|qq=}} The document was originally stored in the archives of the {{ill|Kujō family|en|Kujō family|qid=Q1791350|lt=Kujō family|1=Kujō family}}. It was rediscovered in {{ill|1955|en|1955|qid=Q18577|lt=Showa 30|1=1955}} by Kōzō Korezawa and is now housed in the {{ill|Archives and Mausolea Department|en|Archives and Mausolea Department|qid=Q4346533|lt=Archives and Mausolea Department|1=Archives and Mausolea Department}} of the {{ill|Imperial Household Agency|en|Imperial Household Agency|qid=Q1143602|lt=Imperial Household Agency|1=Imperial Household Agency}}.{{Sfn|Maenosono|1977|pp=115–147|qq=}} == Research == Kōzō Korezawa discovered the Kujō Family’s ''Mototsufumi'' and noted that a different version, the Tanimori manuscript, was also cataloged in the Shoryōbu archives. Between 1955 and 1958, he published three key papers: ''The 11ly Discovered Deity of Awaga Shrine,'' ''Research on the Awaga Daimyōjin Mototsufumi'' (Parts I and II), and ''On the Awaga Daimyōjin Mototsufumi of Tajima Province, Asago District.'' His studies emphasized the following: * The Kujō manuscript is a copy made during the {{ill|Kamakura period|en|Kamakura period|qid=Q236205|lt=Kamakura period|1=Kamakura period}} or early {{ill|Muromachi period|en|Muromachi period|qid=Q334845|lt=Muromachi period|1=Muromachi period}}. * The deity enshrined at Awaga Shrine was originally {{ill|Ame-no-Misari-no-Mikoto|ja|天美佐利命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-Misari-no-Mikoto|qq=}}, contrary to confusion in the medieval period. * The date of the document’s compilation, Wadō 1 (708), aligns with the {{ill|Jitō era|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jitō era|qq=}} edict for clans such as the {{ill|Ōmiwa clan|ja|大三輪氏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōmiwa clan|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 大神氏|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 大神氏|1=Miwa clan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11438330}} to present their genealogies. The ''Mototsufumi'' is closely connected to these records. * The compiler, Jinbu no Sukune Nemaro, is likely identical to the ''Miwa no Kimi Nemaro'' mentioned in the ''Nihon Shoki'' entry for {{ill|Tenji 2|ja|天智2年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenji 2|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. * Its vertical lineage chart predates comparable genealogical records such as those in the {{ill|Waki clan genealogy|ja|和気氏系図|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Waki clan genealogy|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the {{ill|Ama-no-Miwa genealogy|ja|天野系図|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ama-no-Miwa genealogy|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, making it a valuable source. * While there are inconsistencies, such as the presence of {{ill|Posthumous name|en|Posthumous name|qid=Q696100|lt=Chinese-style posthumous titles|1=Posthumous name}} and place names incompatible with its purported date, the original manuscript remains a vital historical and linguistic artifact.{{Sfn|Korezawa|1955|pp=133–196|qq=}}{{Sfn|Korezawa|1956|pp=31–73|qq=}}{{Sfn|Korezawa|1957|pp=1–17|qq=}}{{Sfn|Korezawa|1958|pp=40–64|qq=}} Several scholars, including {{ill|Takashi Tanaka|ja|田中卓|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takashi Tanaka|1=Takashi Tanaka|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11575370}}, recognized its significance in tracing the genealogy of ancient clans and its connections to the ''{{ill|Nihon Shoki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nihon Shoki|qq=}}'' and ''{{ill|Kujiki|en|Kujiki|qid=Q2716751|lt=Sendai Kuji Hongi|1=Kujiki}}''.{{Sfn|Tanaka|1956|pp=91–113|qq=}} == Genealogy in the book ==
{{familytree/start|style=font-size:85%|qq=}} {{familytree |border=0|||||||01||||| 01='''{{ill|Izanagi|en|Izanagi|qid=Q813858|lt=Izanagi|1=Izanagi}}'''|qq=}} {{familytree |border=0| |||||||!|||||||qq=}} {{familytree |border=0|||||||01||||| 01='''{{ill|Yashimajinumi|en|Yashimajinumi|qid=Q55522907|lt=Yashimajinumi|1=Yashimajinumi}}'''|qq=}} {{familytree |border=0| |||||||!|||||||qq=}} {{familytree |border=0|||||||01||||| 01='''{{ill|Nunubono Mochikunasunu|de|Nunubono Mochikunasunu|ja|布波能母遅久奴須奴神|1=Fuha-no-Mojikunusunu|qq=布波能母知汗那須奴|lt_ja=布波能母知汗那須奴|lt_de=Nunubono Mochikunasunu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nunubono Mochikunasunu|13=User:Immanuelle/Fuha-no-Mojikunusunu|qq=}}'''|qq=}} {{familytree |border=0| |||||||!|||||||qq=}} {{familytree |border=0|||||||01||||| 01='''{{ill|Deep Abyss Water Yorireka|de|Deep Abyss Water Yorireka|ja|深淵之水夜礼花神|1=Fukabuchi-no-Mizuyarehana|qq=深淵之水夜礼花|lt_ja=深淵之水夜礼花|lt_de=Deep Abyss Water Yorireka|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Deep Abyss Water Yorireka|13=User:Immanuelle/Fukabuchi-no-Mizuyarehana|qq=}}'''|qq=}} {{familytree |border=0| |||||||!|||||||qq=}} {{familytree 01='''{{ill|Ame-no-Fuyukinu|en|Ame-no-Fuyukinu|qid=Q48744862|lt=Ame-no-Fuyukinu|1=Ame-no-Fuyukinu}}'''|qq=}} {{familytree |border=0| |||||||!|||||||qq=}} {{familytree |border=0|||||||01||||| 01='''{{ill|Ōkuninushi|en|Ōkuninushi|qid=Q276944|lt=Ōkuninushi|1=Ōkuninushi}}'''|qq=}} {{familytree |border=0| |||||||!|||||||qq=}} {{familytree |border=0|||||||01||||| 01='''{{ill|Kushisuhigatamino-mikoto|de|Kushisuhigatamino-mikoto|ja|久斯比賀多命|1=Kamo no Okimi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kushisuhigatamino-mikoto|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamo no Okimi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 鴨王 (上古)|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 鴨王 (上古)}}'''|qq=}} {{familytree |border=0| |||||||!|||||||qq=}} {{familytree |border=0|||||||01||||| 01='''{{ill|Kushisuhigatamino-mikoto|de|Kushisuhigatamino-mikoto|ja|久斯比賀多命|1=Kamo no Okimi|qq=阿麻能比賀大命|lt_ja=阿麻能比賀大命|lt_de=Kushisuhigatamino-mikoto|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kushisuhigatamino-mikoto|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamo no Okimi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 鴨王 (上古)|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 鴨王 (上古)}}'''|qq=}} {{familytree |border=0| |||||||!|||||||qq=}} {{familytree |border=0|||||||01||||| 01='''{{ill|Kushimikedo Noshiharapochibi|de|Kushimikedo Noshiharapochibi|ja|櫛甕戸忍栖浦浦稚日|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kushimikedo Noshiharapochibi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}'''|qq=}} {{familytree |border=0| |||||||!|||||||qq=}} {{familytree |border=0|||||||01||||| 01='''{{ill|Kushimikedo Noshikatsuhaya|de|Kushimikedo invalid|qid=DELETED_QID|1=Q135551110}}'''|qq=}} {{familytree |border=0| |||||||!|||||||qq=}} {{familytree |border=0|||||||01||||| 01='''{{ill|Kamibe Tsumuji|de|Kamibe invalid|qid=DELETED_QID|1=Q135551111}}'''|qq=}} {{familytree |border=0| |||||||!|||||||qq=}} {{familytree |border=0|||||||01||||| 01='''{{ill|Kamibe Manyo|de|Kamibe Manyo|ja|神部万侶|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamibe Manyo|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=DELETED_QID|1=Q135551112}}'''|qq=}} {{familytree |border=0| |||||||!|||||||qq=}} {{familytree |border=0|||||||01||||| 01='''{{ill|Mikazane Maro|de|Mikazane {{familytree/end|qq=}}
== References == {{Reflist|qq=}} == Bibliography == * {{Cite journal|和書|author=Kōzō Korezawa|title=The 11ly Discovered Deity of Awaga Shrine|journal=Shinto and Religion Studies|issue=10|year=1955|publisher=Shinto Theology Association|ref={{SfnRef|Korezawa|1955|qq=}}|qq=}} * {{Cite journal|和書|author=Kōzō Korezawa|title=Research on the Awaga Daimyōjin Mototsufumi|journal=Proceedings of the Japan Academy|volume=14|issue=3|year=1956|publisher=Japan Academy|ref={{SfnRef|Korezawa|1956|qq=}}|qq=}} == Related Articles == * {{ill|Mount Miwa|en|Mount Miwa|qid=Q860627|lt=Mount Miwa|1=Mount Miwa}} * {{ill|Miwa clan|en|Miwa clan|qid=Q11438330|lt=Ōmiwa clan|1=Miwa clan}} == External Links == * [https://shoryobu.kunaicho.go.jp/Toshoryo/Detail/1000671700000 Awaga Daimyōjin Mototsufumi (Vertical Genealogy, Wadō 1)] – Shoryōbu Catalog * [https://shoryobu.kunaicho.go.jp/Toshoryo/Detail/1000497090000?index=3884&sort=Title&searchtype=Category:100 oldest pages]][[Category&archive=Toshoryo Awaga Daimyōjin Mototsufumi (Tanimori manuscript)] – Shoryōbu Catalog [[ja:粟鹿大明神元記]] [[ja:粟鹿大明神元記に記された系図]] [[de:Awashika Daimyōjin Genki ni Kisarareta Keizu]] {{translated page|ja|粟鹿大明神元記|version=103188501|comment=Imported full ja history}} [[en:Awaga Daimyojin Mototsufumi]] {{wikidata link|Q136720350}} [[Category:Japan in 708]] [[Category:8th-century books]] [[Category:Tajima Province]] [[Category:日本の古文書]] [[Category:Pages with deleted QID in ill template]]
